2141490.name: Skirmishers
2141490.description:
Skirmishers is a Real Time Strategy game, unlike most of the RTS, you can only control ONE character directly who can rally others around him and command them march together or fight alongside him.

Key Features


  • Available in English and Spanish languages.

  • Rally all nearby units to follow you, and your orders.

  • Use the Attack command to order you and your warriors to attack a specific target.

  • Use Solo Mode to stop commanding your units and attack or go to the destination alone.

  • Use Aggressive Stance to command all units to attack their nearest target on sight.

  • Capture buildings to produce resources and train units to bolster your army.

  • Create special unique units with unique spells and abilities at your command.
2141490.supported_languages:
英语*, 西班牙语 - 西班牙*, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
